verdicts.reason: Correct cubic FCC, *(2,2,2) supercell, prints cell and 32 atoms.
Pt(111) 4-layer slab, CO ontop, vacuum 10; prints atom count.
mx2 monolayer MoS2 with 10A vacuum; prints cell vectors and lengths.
H2O EMT BFGS optimize; prints initial and final energy.
Langevin 300K 5fs 100 steps on Cu 2x2x2; prints temp/energy.
VelocityVerlet NVE 50 steps, MB 300K, prints initial/final total energy.
N2 EMT vibrations after opt; prints frequencies as requested.
Write/read POSCAR vasp format; prints atom count and cell parameters.
Octahedron Cu length=5; prints atom count and positions shape.
Al bcc a=3.3 cubic; prints cell and chemical formula.
Ti hcp a=2.95 c=a*1.59; prints cell vectors and positions.
Si diamond a=5.43, 3x3x3 supercell; prints atom count and volume.
fcc100 Cu size(3,3,3) vacuum12; prints atoms and cell.
bcc110 Fe size(2,2,4) vacuum10; prints atoms and cell dims.
surface (2,1,1) 3 layers plus add_vacuum 10; prints atoms and cell.
CH4 from G2; prints coordinates, C-H bond lengths, formula.
Manual CO2, box, pbc False; get_distances yields correct distance matrix.
nanotube (6,6) length=4; prints atom count and cell.
Icosahedron Au noshells=3; prints atoms and center of mass.
Al(111) 3-layer, N2 bridge height2 vacuum10; prints atoms and symbols.
OH on Pt(111) at three sites, EMT single-points, prints lowest-energy site.
Au FCC LBFGS via FrechetCellFilter fmax0.01; prints steps and energy.
FrechetCellFilter+BFGS Cu, fmax0.01; prints cell/energy before and after.
PreconLBFGS precon=auto Ni FCC fmax0.01; prints steps, energy, cell a.
VelocityVerlet 200 steps Pd 2x2x2 500K 2fs; prints energy difference.
EMT H2O modes are largely imaginary; taking .real and top-3 masks unphysical frequencies.
CH4 EMT optimize then vibrations; filters and prints real frequencies.
3-image NEB linear interpolation Al3 EMT; prints each image energy.
Primitive FCC cell used; a0=v0**(1/3) wrong (gives ~2.57 not ~4.09); B correct.
N2 EMT vib, IdealGasThermo linear symnum2; prints Gibbs at 298.15K 1atm.
Write/read XYZ; prints symbols and positions.
10-step MD to traj, re-read; prints 11 frames and last energy.
DB write layers metadata, select layers=3; prints atom count.
FixAtoms bottom 2 layers by tag, BFGS; compares fixed coords before/after.
FixBondLength on H2 at 0.9A; prints bond length/energy before and after.
CO on Pt(111), FixAtoms bottom + FixBondLength, BFGS; prints energy and C-O dist.
NeighborList natural_cutoffs bothways; prints average coordination (12).
get_distances atom0 to others mic=True; prints min and max distance.
